gh:i-ninte/deriv-rag.name: deriv-rag
gh:i-ninte/deriv-rag.pitch: Lightweight RAG pipeline that loads local documents, chunks them, builds a FAISS vector index, retrieves relevant context, and generates grounded answers with validated citations using Google Gemini.

gh:i-ninte/portfolio.name: portfolio
gh:i-ninte/portfolio.pitch: Portfolio repository showcasing development work and projects, serving as a central hub for demonstrating technical capabilities and completed implementations across various domains.

gh:i-ninte/geoforest.name: geoforest
gh:i-ninte/geoforest.pitch: We built an automated system that detects deforestation and illegal mining in Ghana using Sentinel-2 satellite imagery, RF-DETR object detection, and temporal vegetation tracking to generate near-real-time forest loss alerts.

gh:i-ninte/i-ninte.name: i-ninte
gh:i-ninte/i-ninte.pitch: I build interpretable, resource-efficient AI systems for healthcare and agriculture across Africa, combining multimodal reasoning with data scarcity solutions for real-world deployment.

gh:i-ninte/tillmate.name: tillmate
gh:i-ninte/tillmate.pitch: Mobile ground control station for farmers operating autonomous agricultural machines over WiFi and MAVLink, with real-time monitoring, direct implement control, and mission planning on satellite maps.

gh:i-ninte/GhanaNLP-data-models-play.name: GhanaNLP-data-models-play
gh:i-ninte/GhanaNLP-data-models-play.pitch: Training notebooks for bidirectional Twi-English neural machine translation, moving from MarianMT baselines toward production-quality models on GhanaNLP's parallel text dataset.

gh:i-ninte/DATA-OCEAN.name: DATA-OCEAN
gh:i-ninte/DATA-OCEAN.pitch: Data-Ocean is a platform for discovering and analyzing ocean-related datasets, connecting researchers with maritime environmental data sources and tools for coastal science applications.

gh:i-ninte/tensorflow.name: tensorflow
gh:i-ninte/tensorflow.pitch: Custom Keras model class that stacks four specific layer types and routes inputs through them sequentially via a defined call function.

gh:i-ninte/queryamie.name: queryamie
gh:i-ninte/queryamie.pitch: I built a query tool that helps you search and interact with data more naturally, focusing on making database operations accessible without requiring SQL expertise.

gh:i-ninte/jobliftai.name: jobliftai
gh:i-ninte/jobliftai.pitch: FastAPI backend serving a job matching system with model inference capabilities, handling job candidate matching through API endpoints and integrated ML model scoring.

gh:i-ninte/jobmatch-fastapi.name: jobmatch-fastapi
gh:i-ninte/jobmatch-fastapi.pitch: FastAPI backend service for a job matching system, handling model serving and API endpoints to connect job seekers with relevant opportunities through intelligent matching.

gh:i-ninte/ATS.name: ATS
gh:i-ninte/ATS.pitch: Web tool that uses Gemini 1.5 Flash to score resume matches against job descriptions, extracting PDFs and showing missing keywords for improvement.

gh:i-ninte/machine_learning.name: machine_learning
gh:i-ninte/machine_learning.pitch: Collection of machine learning projects demonstrating decision trees, random forests, and neural networks across image classification, fake news detection, and predictive modeling tasks.

gh:i-ninte/OCR-query.name: OCR-query
gh:i-ninte/OCR-query.pitch: We built a computer vision system that reads text from images and queries a database with the extracted content, combining OCR with database operations.

gh:i-ninte/KNUST-ML-AI.name: KNUST-ML-AI
gh:i-ninte/KNUST-ML-AI.pitch: Educational materials and resources for machine learning and AI training at KNUST's Data Science Club, covering foundational concepts and practical applications.

gh:i-ninte/data-analytics-R-python.name: data-analytics-R-python
gh:i-ninte/data-analytics-R-python.pitch: Collection of data analytics projects demonstrating exploratory analysis, visualization, and statistical modeling workflows using R and Python across multiple practical applications.

gh:i-ninte/Aquamind-fullstack.name: Aquamind-fullstack
gh:i-ninte/Aquamind-fullstack.pitch: I'm building a full-stack application called Aquamind with complete frontend and backend infrastructure, handling the full technical stack from database to user interface.

gh:i-ninte/computer-vision-and-robotics.name: computer-vision-and-robotics
gh:i-ninte/computer-vision-and-robotics.pitch: Building face detection and recognition systems using OpenCV and Haar Cascade classifiers for practical image processing and robotics applications.

gh:i-ninte/student_performance.name: student_performance
gh:i-ninte/student_performance.pitch: I built a system to predict student academic outcomes using historical enrollment and performance data, applying machine learning models to identify at-risk learners early for intervention.

gh:i-ninte/aquamind-sensors.name: aquamind-sensors
gh:i-ninte/aquamind-sensors.pitch: We built IoT sensor systems for water quality monitoring in resource-constrained environments, collecting real-time data on pH, turbidity, and contamination across distributed monitoring networks.

gh:i-ninte/Your_farm.name: Your_farm
gh:i-ninte/Your_farm.pitch: FastAPI backend for identifying crop diseases from images, enabling farmers to diagnose plant health problems and take action quickly.

gh:i-ninte/gemma-cookbook.name: gemma-cookbook
gh:i-ninte/gemma-cookbook.pitch: Collection of practical examples and tutorials for building with Gemma models, covering everything from basic inference to advanced fine-tuning and deployment scenarios.

gh:i-ninte/aquamind1.name: aquamind1
gh:i-ninte/aquamind1.pitch: FastAPI service that predicts water quality metrics, enabling real-time monitoring and assessment of aquatic environments through machine learning inference.

gh:i-ninte/Alfido-Tech.name: Alfido-Tech
gh:i-ninte/Alfido-Tech.pitch: Three internship projects applying data analytics to real-world problems: building dashboards from Uber trip data, optimizing inventory tracking systems, and analyzing weather patterns for actionable insights.

gh:i-ninte/odin_.name: odin_
gh:i-ninte/odin_.pitch: Odin Project teaches web development fundamentals through hands-on exercises covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and full-stack frameworks for building real applications.

gh:i-ninte/DSA.name: DSA
gh:i-ninte/DSA.pitch: A data structures and algorithms repository covering fundamental CS concepts with implementations and explanations for software engineering interview preparation and practical coding.

gh:i-ninte/odin_project.name: odin_project
gh:i-ninte/odin_project.pitch: I'm building web development skills through the Odin Project, working across HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and React to create interactive applications and strengthen full-stack fundamentals.

gh:i-ninte/OOP.name: OOP
gh:i-ninte/OOP.pitch: C++ implementation of object-oriented programming concepts covering classes, inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation with practical code examples.

gh:i-ninte/bash.name: bash
gh:i-ninte/bash.pitch: Collection of bash scripts progressing from variable basics through control flow to system automation, including server setup and monitoring tools for disk, CPU, memory checks.

gh:i-ninte/SQL_with_BiQquery.name: SQL_with_BiQquery
gh:i-ninte/SQL_with_BiQquery.pitch: A repository for learning and working with SQL queries using Google BigQuery, focusing on practical database operations and data analysis techniques.

gh:i-ninte/Landing_page.name: Landing_page
gh:i-ninte/Landing_page.pitch: A landing page repository with minimal description available; appears to be a web project foundation without detailed implementation information to characterize its specific technical approach or purpose.

hf:model:ninte/student_performance.name: ninte/student_performance
hf:model:ninte/student_performance.pitch: A model trained to predict student performance outcomes using educational data, enabling educators to identify at-risk learners and personalize interventions based on historical patterns.

hf:model:ninte/car-damage-detection.name: ninte/car-damage-detection
hf:model:ninte/car-damage-detection.pitch: I built a car damage detection model that identifies and localizes vehicle damage from images using computer vision techniques.

hf:model:ninte/twi-en-marianmt.name: ninte/twi-en-marianmt
hf:model:ninte/twi-en-marianmt.pitch: MarianMT model for bidirectional Twi-English translation trained on 10,370 parallel sentences from Ghana, reaching 10.5 BLEU on Twi→English and establishing a functional baseline for low-resource African language translation.

hf:model:ninte/twi-en-nllb-v2.name: ninte/twi-en-nllb-v2
hf:model:ninte/twi-en-nllb-v2.pitch: Fine-tuned NLLB model translating Twi to English on Ghana's low-resource language pair, delivering 27 BLEU against 10.5 baseline through targeted pretraining on 9,600 parallel sentences.

local:credit-unions-solution-client.name: credit-unions-solution-client
local:credit-unions-solution-client.pitch: Next.js frontend application for credit unions, serving as the client interface to manage member accounts and financial operations with modern web standards.

local:tccu.name: tccu
local:tccu.pitch: Next.js web application project with TypeScript support, server-side rendering capabilities, and optimized font loading for modern web interfaces.

local:tillmate.name: tillmate
local:tillmate.pitch: Mobile ground control station for agricultural machines that lets farmers monitor tiller health, control implements, and plan field missions through a 30-second-learnable interface connected via MAVLink over WiFi.

local:deriv-rag.name: deriv-rag
local:deriv-rag.pitch: A lightweight RAG pipeline that answers questions from local markdown and text documents using FAISS retrieval and Google Gemini generation, with citation validation to keep answers grounded.

local:dataocean_backend.name: dataocean_backend
local:dataocean_backend.pitch: FastAPI backend handling question management, submission tracking, contact forms, and Google Meet scheduling with automated email notifications for a consultancy website.

local:GhanaNLP-data-models-play.name: GhanaNLP-data-models-play
local:GhanaNLP-data-models-play.pitch: Building bidirectional Twi-English neural machine translation with MarianMT and NLLB, starting from a v1 baseline and iterating toward production quality on Ghana's most spoken language.

local:bbfship.name: bbfship
local:bbfship.pitch: Full-stack commerce platform built with Next.js and MySQL, featuring WhatsApp ordering, admin catalog management, customer tracking, billing, payments, and templated email workflows for curated storefronts.

local:credit-unions-solution-server.name: credit-unions-solution-server
local:credit-unions-solution-server.pitch: Backend server managing payment processing and financial operations for a credit union banking system, handling transactions and member account interactions.

local:ecoscan.name: ecoscan
local:ecoscan.pitch: Environmental monitoring dashboard for Ghana combining satellite hotspot detection with community incident reports, built on FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend for law enforcement and environmental agencies.

local:skyrush.name: skyrush
local:skyrush.pitch: Server-authoritative crash game with provably-fair RNG, WebSocket state sync, wallet arbitration, and PostgreSQL audit trail ready for operator integration.

local:geoforest.name: geoforest
local:geoforest.pitch: We built a satellite monitoring system using Sentinel-2 imagery and deep learning to detect forest loss and illegal mining activity in Ghana through vegetation indices and object detection.

local:DEV2WINN.name: DEV2WINN
local:DEV2WINN.pitch: Full-stack mentorship platform connecting tech learners with AI and human mentors using Claude reasoning, adaptive skill tracking, and intelligent matching algorithms.

local:Kyini.name: Kyini
local:Kyini.pitch: Ghana group travel booking platform where travelers browse and book curated trips with payment processing, while hosts propose trips and admins manage the full marketplace including messaging, refunds, and email campaigns.
